children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The authority of the Secretary of Transportation to provide insurance and reinsurance under any provision of this chapter other than sections 44302a and 44305 is not effective after .December 11, 2014

children.heading: .—Insurance of United States Government Property
children.label: b .—Insurance of United States Government Property
children.text: The authority of the Secretary of Transportation to provide insurance and reinsurance for a department, agency, or instrumentality of the United States Government under section 44305 is not effective after .September 30, 2028
